channel.title: Posts on Deep Dives with Ian
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Deep Dives with Ian

item.title: Updates on Learning: An Introspective
item.description:
##The Beginning

I Think its a unique ability that some people posses to truly look introspectivly and work through problems that are occuring. I feel that, like others I have met, I do not have this ability. I find that I lack a lot of the necessary skills or qualifying behaviors to impliment this in any real meaningful way. I want to change that. I want to be able to look in and see success and failure, not just the failures. This is not the true beg deginning of this, but we are still in the begining arc

item.title: Welcome
item.description:
A Brief introduction

This is a short form site that will most likely change as time goes on that will be where I put my individual changes and ideas. I am not sure exactly how often or what I will cover, but I want to make sure that I am doing something that is built by me and for me!

I will eventually link things and be more specific on what my individual set up is, right now this is a very niche place that will be my home on the world wide webs.
